title: Harissa Paneer Sandwich
instructions: Pan fry paneer and then marinate in harissa paste
notes: Meal prep friendly - From Harissa paste meal prep

title: Rajma Chawal
ingredients: 1tsp Haldi, 1.5 tsp chilli powder, 1tsp coriander powder, 1 tsp garam masala
instructions: Onions and tomatoes with powdered spices

title: Kadhi
instructions: Vaghar of cloves, star anise, cinammon stick, mustard seeds, garlic, green chillies
Whisk 3 cups water with besan and greek yogurt and pour into vaghar
Add a 2nd ghee vaghar of red chillies and karipatta
notes: Keep whisking all the time and vook on slow gas until the end

title: Harissa Paste
ingredients: 1 tsp Cumin seeds, 1 tsp Coriander seeds, 5-6 Methi seeds, 1tsp fennel seeds, 1/4 tsp Ajwain
instructions: Roast and then grind the dry spices first
Soak red chillies in hot water for 10 mins
Blend all ingredients and add salt to taste
